Keywords: tap touch select activate click
Expected Response: Activates button / selects item / opens link
iOS Hint: UITapGestureRecognizer; minimum 44×44pt target
Accessibility Alternative: Use standard button/link elements — automatically activatable by screen reader

Keywords: double tap zoom accessibility magnify
Expected Response: Zoom in map/image; Like action (social); re-focus
iOS Hint: UITapGestureRecognizer numberOfTapsRequired=2; MKMapView zoom
Accessibility Alternative: Not recommended as primary action — VoiceOver uses double tap for activation; provide tap alternative

Keywords: long press hold press haptic context menu
Expected Response: Context menu appears; drag enablement; haptic feedback; copy/paste
iOS Hint: UILongPressGestureRecognizer; minimumPressDuration 0.5s; UIContextMenuInteraction
Accessibility Alternative: VoiceOver 'Actions' menu replicates long press; Android: long press must have keyboard/TalkBack equivalent

Keywords: swipe left list action delete archive dismiss
Trigger: Horizontal swipe left on list item >30% width
Expected Response: Reveals delete / archive / action buttons
Conflicts: Scroll (if threshold not met); Swipe right
iOS Hint: UISwipeActionsConfiguration; UITableView trailingSwipeActions; reveal destructive red action
Android Hint: ItemTouchHelper; SwipeToDismiss in Compose; swipeableItem Compose
Accessibility Alternative: TalkBack 'Actions' menu provides delete/archive without swipe; announce available actions on focus

Keywords: swipe right list action archive mark read
Trigger: Horizontal swipe right on list item
Expected Response: Reveals leading action (archive mark-read flag)
iOS Hint: UITableView leadingSwipeActions; non-destructive green/blue action
Accessibility Alternative: TalkBack: 'Actions' menu for same actions; leading actions less discoverable — ensure TalkBack alternative

Keywords: pull to refresh refresh reload swipe down top
Trigger: Pull list downward from very top (beyond scroll start)
Expected Response: Loading indicator appears; content refreshes
iOS Hint: UIRefreshControl; attach to UIScrollView; spinner + message
Android Hint: SwipeRefreshLayout; PullRefresh in Compose; RefreshIndicator in Flutter
Accessibility Alternative: Not accessible via TalkBack/VoiceOver by default — add a refresh button always; announce 'refreshed' when done

Keywords: swipe down dismiss modal sheet close
Trigger: Swipe modal/sheet downward from anywhere / drag handle
Expected Response: Modal closes / sheet collapses to smaller detent
iOS Hint: UISheetPresentationController; isModalInPresentation prevents dismiss; grabber visible
Android Hint: Not standard on Android — use close button or scrim tap
Accessibility Alternative: Modal close button (X/Done) is the accessible path; announce 'dismissed' on close

Keywords: edge swipe back iOS navigation gesture return
Trigger: Swipe right starting from left edge of screen
Expected Response: Navigates back to previous screen with push animation
Conflicts: Overlapping horizontal scroll at screen edge
iOS Hint: interactivePopGestureRecognizer; enabled by default in UINavigationController; can conflict with side drawers
Android Hint: Not applicable — Android uses system back
Accessibility Alternative: Fully supported by VoiceOver navigation as 'back'; no extra work needed; conflicts with drawer swipe — choose one

Keywords: android back swipe predictive gesture system
Trigger: Swipe inward from either screen edge (Android 13+)
Expected Response: Returns to previous screen; predictive back preview shows destination (API 34+)
iOS Hint: Not applicable on iOS
Android Hint: Enable predictive back: android:enableOnBackInvokedCallback=true; handle in onBackPressedDispatcher
Accessibility Alternative: System-level — fully accessible via TalkBack; predictive back shows visual preview

Keywords: pinch zoom scale expand collapse two finger
Trigger: Two fingers move apart (zoom in) or together (zoom out)
Expected Response: Scales content (map image PDF); zoom level changes
iOS Hint: UIPinchGestureRecognizer; min/max scale limits; spring-back to bounds
Accessibility Alternative: Add zoom in/out buttons as alternative; screen reader users cannot do multi-touch; announce zoom level

Keywords: rotate two finger turn orientation
Expected Response: Rotates image / map orientation
iOS Hint: UIRotationGestureRecognizer; use alongside pinch for image editors
Accessibility Alternative: Must have button alternative for rotation; announce rotation angle in degrees

Keywords: pan drag move position scroll
Expected Response: Drags element to new position; scrolls content
Conflicts: Long press start confusion; swipe actions at edge
iOS Hint: UIPanGestureRecognizer; UIDragInteraction for drag-and-drop
Accessibility Alternative: Drag-and-drop requires keyboard/accessibility alternative per WCAG 2.5.7; announce new position on drop

Keywords: scroll vertical horizontal swipe momentum
Trigger: One finger swipe on scrollable area
Expected Response: Content scrolls in swipe direction; momentum continues after lift
Conflicts: Swipe actions (conflicting thresholds); Pull to refresh
iOS Hint: UIScrollView; scrollsToTop on status bar tap; bounce effect
Accessibility Alternative: Keyboard arrow keys on large screens; scroll position announced by VoiceOver as percentage; snap points announced

Keywords: two finger scroll accessibility scrolling
Expected Response: VoiceOver: scrolls content; non-VoiceOver: not typically used
iOS Hint: Used by VoiceOver for scrolling when element is focused; not a custom gesture
Android Hint: TalkBack: two-finger scroll is a system gesture too
Accessibility Alternative: This IS the accessibility path — do not override or intercept two-finger scroll

Keywords: three finger tap undo redo ios text
Expected Response: Undo typing (iOS); app-level undo if implemented
iOS Hint: Shake to undo is alternative; three-finger double-tap = redo
Accessibility Alternative: VoiceOver uses three-finger gestures for navigation — never override three-finger gestures

Keywords: shake undo motion gesture accelerometer
Expected Response: Undo last text input action (iOS); custom app-wide undo
iOS Hint: UIResponder.motionBegan(.shake); enabled by default for text; canBecomFirstResponder required
Accessibility Alternative: Shake is not accessible (users with motor impairments); always provide an undo button as alternative

Keywords: force touch 3d touch haptic peek preview
Trigger: Deep press on iOS device with 3D Touch (older iPhones)
Expected Response: Preview popup (Peek); release to open (Pop); swipe up for actions
Conflicts: Long press (use long press as fallback; 3D Touch deprecated)
iOS Hint: availableHapticFeedbackTypes; UIPreviewAction; deprecated in iPhone 11+; replaced by long press
Accessibility Alternative: Long press is modern iOS fallback and is fully accessible; 3D Touch had no accessibility equivalent

Keywords: swipe horizontal pages pager swipe left right
Expected Response: Navigates to adjacent page; page indicator updates
iOS Hint: UIPageViewController; UIScrollView.isPagingEnabled; SwiftUI TabView + .page style
Android Hint: ViewPager2; HorizontalPager in Compose; scroll snap CSS-like
Accessibility Alternative: Add prev/next buttons as accessible alternative; announce page number and total; 'Page 2 of 5'

Keywords: sticky header section pin scroll
Expected Response: Section header sticks to top while section content scrolls underneath
iOS Hint: UICollectionView compositional layout section header pinned
Android Hint: StickyHeader in LazyColumn via stickyHeader {}; LazyListState
Accessibility Alternative: Announce section name when pinned header changes; VoiceOver navigates by heading if marked as header

Keywords: scroll top status bar tap
Expected Response: Scrolls content to very top instantly
iOS Hint: UIScrollView.scrollsToTop = true (default); only works on topmost scroll view
Android Hint: No equivalent — add scroll-to-top FAB button on Android
Accessibility Alternative: Accessible via VoiceOver quick nav to top; Android needs explicit button

Keywords: drag reorder list long press drag handle
Trigger: Long press on list item then drag to new position
Expected Response: Item moves with finger; other items shift to accommodate
Conflicts: Long press context menu (resolve by drag handle icon to distinguish)
iOS Hint: UITableView moveRow; UICollectionView drag-and-drop delegate
Accessibility Alternative: WCAG 2.5.7: must have button-based reorder alternative (move up/down); announce position on drop 'Item moved to position 3'

Keywords: fling momentum inertia scroll fast swipe
Expected Response: Content continues scrolling with deceleration; snaps to near item if snap enabled
Conflicts: Scroll to trigger pull-refresh (slow vs fast swipe)
iOS Hint: UIScrollView.decelerationRate (.normal .fast); paging mode snaps to page
Accessibility Alternative: Motion sensitivity: respect reduceMotion — disable momentum for high-motion users if possible

Keywords: haptic taptic feedback vibration touch response
Expected Response: Subtle vibration confirms action (selection impact notification)
Conflicts: Overuse desensitizes; avoid on every tap
iOS Hint: UIImpactFeedbackGenerator (.light .medium .heavy .rigid .soft); UISelectionFeedbackGenerator
Accessibility Alternative: Cannot be configured to be 'accessible-only'; some users have reduced haptics enabled; never use as only feedback

Keywords: pinch zoom map pan map rotate map
Expected Response: Map zooms / pans / rotates to new viewport
iOS Hint: MKMapView handles gestures natively; MapKit SwiftUI or UIKit
Android Hint: Google Maps / MapBox Android handles natively
Accessibility Alternative: Add +/- zoom buttons and compass button for accessible map control; announce map region changes

Keywords: voiceover actions talkback long press context menu accessibility
Trigger: VoiceOver: swipe up for 'Actions' menu; TalkBack: long press or swipe down for context menu
Expected Response: Shows accessible alternative to long-press / swipe gestures
iOS Hint: accessibilityCustomActions: [UIAccessibilityCustomAction]; labels must be descriptive
Android Hint: contentDescription + ViewCompat.addAccessibilityAction(); custom actions in semantics Compose
Accessibility Alternative: This IS the accessibility implementation — always define custom actions for any gesture-based UI
